title: Question: Speeding up verilation
body:
---


Author Name: **Johan Bjork**
Original Redmine Message: 2069 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi everyone,

I've been thinking for a while about various ways to speed up the time it takes to Verilate our projects. No individual stage shows up as taking more time then the others and profiling really only shows node iteration code (iterateAndNext). Before I start looking at ways to improve ast-traversal/node allocation/? (Perhaps by making AstNodes smaller or using fixed memory pools for nodes), I wanted to post our Stats and see if they look normal or if there is any obvious candidates for optimization. We are heavy users of SV interfaces so it's possible there are missed optimization opportunities that would reduce the size of the Ast.

Any other ideas for how to improve build times would also be very appreciated.
Thanks
/Johan
```

(Posting node counts seems impossible due to some server issue with veripool.org, I keep getting Internal server error when trying to add an attachment or submit a large post)
The largest node counts I see in our project are by far CONST and VARREF:
```
